title: carex stenophylla var. pachystylis
intro: Carex stenophylla var. pachystylis, also known as the stenophylla sedge, is a variety of plant belonging to the Carex genus. This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carex stenophylla var. pachystylis include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or as a dried powder to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
